# BlueFox Email

> BlueFox Email is an email marketing platform built specifically for marketing agencies that manage email campaigns for multiple clients. It uses AWS SES as its sending backbone, offering a send-based pricing model (no per-contact fees) and agency-focused features like separated client projects, design systems, and cross-client template reuse.

BlueFox Email was founded by Gyula Németh, a 10+ year veteran of HTML email design and rendering, who also built edmdesigner.com, chamaileon.io, and emailhero.io. The platform is built to solve the specific pain points agencies face: managing multiple clients, ensuring pixel-perfect rendering (including Outlook), maintaining deliverability, and producing client-ready reports without manual effort.

## Core Features

- **Multi-client project management** — Separate projects per client with team roles and permissions, no shared logins
- **Design Systems** — Reusable variables, components, blocks, and templates with client-specific overrides; build once, deploy everywhere
- **Email Editor** — Drag-and-drop no-code editor producing battle-tested HTML that renders correctly in Gmail, Apple Mail, Outlook, and mobile
- **Transactional Emails** — API-triggered emails for product events (welcome, password reset, billing, etc.)
- **Triggered Emails** — Automated emails based on user behavior and lifecycle events
- **Campaigns** — Broadcast newsletters and promotional email campaigns
- **Automations** — Multi-step automated flows (welcome series, onboarding, re-engagement)
- **Contacts & List Management** — Double opt-in, unsubscribe management, pause subscriptions, suppression lists
- **Analytics** — Open rates, click-through rates, bounce and complaint tracking, campaign dashboards
- **Deliverability Tools** — Domain authentication monitoring, bounce/complaint rate alerts, inbox placement guidance
- **Forms & Pages** — Subscription forms and landing pages
- **Integrations** — Webhooks, Supabase, Zapier; REST API for contacts, subscriber lists, transactional/triggered sending, and attachments
- **AWS SES Integration** — Bring your own Amazon SES account; BlueFox Email manages the sending infrastructure on top

## Pricing Model

BlueFox Email uses a **send-based pricing model** — you pay only for the emails you send, not for the number of contacts stored. This is in contrast to Mailchimp, Brevo, and other contact-based ESPs where pricing escalates as your list grows. One annual flat fee covers platform access; AWS SES costs are separate and extremely low (~$0.10 per 1,000 emails).

Current pricing: $100/year for platform access + AWS SES sending costs.

See full pricing details and calculator: https://bluefox.email/pricing

## Who It's For

- **Marketing agencies** managing email campaigns for multiple clients
- **SaaS companies** needing both transactional and marketing email from one platform
- **Developers and technical teams** comfortable using AWS SES who want a polished front-end
- **Teams scaling from one to dozens of client brands** without wanting enterprise-tier pricing

## Free Deliverability & Email Tools

BlueFox Email offers free tools for email senders and developers:

- [SPF Record Checker](https://bluefox.email/tools/deliverability/spf-checker) — Validate your SPF DNS record
- [DKIM Record Checker](https://bluefox.email/tools/deliverability/dkim-checker) — Verify DKIM selector and public key
- [DMARC Record Checker](https://bluefox.email/tools/deliverability/dmarc-checker) — Analyze your DMARC policy
- [DMARC Report Analyzer](https://bluefox.email/tools/deliverability/dmarc-report-analyzer) — Parse and interpret DMARC XML aggregate reports
- [MX Record Checker](https://bluefox.email/tools/deliverability/mx-checker) — Check mail exchange records for any domain
- [Email Link Checker](https://bluefox.email/tools/content/link-checker) — Test all links in an email for redirects, broken URLs, and open tracker patterns
